content.situation: 你刚提交了工作签证申请，对方告诉你审核需要一段时间，并会通过邮件通知结果。
content.speakerText: Your application is under review. We'll notify you by email once a decision is made.
content.speakerTextCn: 你的申请正在审核中，一旦有结果我们会通过邮件通知你。
content.responseTemplate: I'll keep an eye on my inbox, but ___?

blanks.answer: what if I don't receive it
options: what if I don't receive it
can you send it to my phone

content.hint: 表达对邮件可能遗漏的担忧，使用条件句询问替代方案
content.knowledgePoint: 表达对流程不确定性的合理关切

content.situation: 你在线提交了奖学金申请，系统显示已接收，但你不确定是否还需要上传额外材料。
content.speakerText: Your application has been successfully submitted.
content.responseTemplate: Great, thanks! ___ to make sure everything is complete?

blanks.answer: Could you confirm if any documents are missing
options: Could you confirm if any documents are missing
Do I need to print this out

content.hint: 礼貌请求确认材料完整性，避免遗漏关键步骤

content.situation: 你刚通过官网提交了住房申请，对方提醒你将在一周内收到确认邮件，但你希望确保能及时收到。
content.speakerText: You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
content.speakerTextCn: 你很快会收到一封确认邮件。
content.responseTemplate: Thanks! ___ just in case it ends up in spam.
content.hint: 体现主动预防意识，使用常见表达避免错过重要通知
content.knowledgePoint: 主动预防沟通遗漏的常用表达
